requiredEvidence: Remote staging dispatch executes the named predeployed user Worker.
Only explicitly passed capabilities are visible.
A missing script fails without dynamic-mode fallback.
All temporary staging resources are cleaned up.
Snapshot or backup preserves exact filesystem bytes across provider restart.
Restore creates a new generation and never retargets an open Session.
Credentials remain outside the agent-visible filesystem and process environment.
All temporary staging resources are cleaned up.

claim: No remote deployment or provider evidence is claimed by W8 without explicit staging consent.
